nasb.text: When you reached this place, Sihon the king of Heshbon and Og the king of Bashan came out to meet us for battle, but we defeated them;

esv.text: And when you came to this place, Sihon the king of Heshbon and Og the king of Bashan came out against us to battle, but we defeated them.

cnv.text: 你們來到了這地方，希實本王西宏和巴珊王噩就出來，與我們交戰，我們擊敗了他們。

ccb.text: 我们来到这里的时候，希实本王西宏和巴珊王噩都来攻击我们，我们击败了他们，
